loop1.title: Current Live Health
loop1.note: The card requests harmonic and THD metrics (H3, H5, H7, I-THD, V-THD, K-factor), but the asset's column basket contains only current/voltage magnitudes and unbalance/deviation percentages. No harmonic data is recorded for this meter.

loop2: After re-routing to 'individual-feeder-meter-shell/voltage-current', these still cannot be answered from the available data: 27 (The required harmonic and K-factor columns (harmonic_3rd_pct, harmonic_5th_pct, harmonic_7th_pct, thd_voltage_r_pct, k_factor) are not present in the asset's DB schema. The card cannot render its intended power-quality signature.). The requested information isn't recorded for this asset on any available template.
